tool.name: AgrVATE
tool.description: typing-only Staphylococcus aureus agr locus classification
tool.command:
set -euo pipefail
rm -f input.fasta ln -s '$input_fasta' input.fasta
agrvate -i input.fasta --typing-only --force
copy_or_touch() { pattern="\$1" output="\$2" matched_file="\$(find . -name "\${pattern}" -type f -print -quit || true)"
if [ -n "\${matched_file}" ] && [ -f "\${matched_file}" ]; then cp "\${matched_file}" "\${output}" else touch "\${output}" fi }
copy_or_touch '*-summary.tab' agrvate_summary.tab copy_or_touch '*-agr_gp.tab' agrvate_agr_group_hits.tab copy_or_touch '*-error-report.tab' agrvate_error_report.tab
agrvate --version > agrvate_version.txt 2>&1

param.name: input_fasta
param.label: S. aureus genome assembly FASTA
param.help: Input genome assembly in FASTA format. AgrVATE is intended for Staphylococcus aureus assemblies.

tool.help:
AgrVATE: Agr Variant Assessment & Typing Engine ================================================
AgrVATE identifies the Staphylococcus aureus agr locus type from a genome assembly FASTA file.
This Galaxy wrapper runs AgrVATE in typing-only mode:
agrvate -i input.fasta --typing-only --force
Input -----
- A Staphylococcus aureus genome assembly in FASTA format.
Outputs -------
- agr typing summary - agr group hits - error report - AgrVATE version
Database --------
The AgrVATE conda package includes the AgrVATE database directory:
$CONDA_PREFIX/bin/agrvate_databases
Therefore this wrapper does not expose the -d / --databases option and does not require a Galaxy Data Manager.
Notes -----
This wrapper intentionally uses AgrVATE typing-only mode. It does not run the optional MUMmer/Snippy-based agr operon extraction or frameshift detection steps.
